fallback.question_en: What happens to Ice Boy if he sits on a sunny playground slide?
fallback.question_zh: 如果 Ice Boy 坐在大太陽底下的溜滑梯上，他會怎麼樣？
fallback.explanation_en: The hot slide warms Ice Boy up, turning his solid form into a warm liquid!
fallback.explanation_zh: 滾燙的溜滑梯使 Ice Boy 變熱，將他的固體狀態融化為溫暖的液體狀態！
